summary:
CORPORATE PRAYER AND DIVINE PROVISION: Brandon emphasizes the necessity of corporate prayer during the last days, focusing on interceding for unsaved loved ones and the nation. He conducts his personal prayer routine, seeking God's provision for the upcoming month of September. Brandon specifically asks for financial provision covering household bills such as electricity, water, gas, phones, and car payments. He sings various hymns and worship songs, affirming God as the ultimate provider and inviting the Holy Spirit into homes, jobs, and workplaces.

SPIRITUAL PROTECTION AND HEALING: Brandon pleads for divine protection over children attending school, asking that no demonic attack or weapon formed against them shall prosper, referencing Psalms 23 and 91. He takes spiritual authority over Satan, commanding an end to storms within marriages and families. Brandon calls for comprehensive healing, declaring individuals to be mentally, emotionally, physically, and financially whole. He explicitly prays for protection against a specific virus, declaring divine safety over the righteous and covering families to ensure that no plague comes near them.

END TIMES VISION AND PROPHECY: Brandon recounts a vision involving a wristwatch and Donald Trump. He describes the clock initially moving backwards, rewinding to give more time, before advancing to the fifteen-minute mark. Brandon states this signifies a temporary delay and that the allotted time has now expired as the current dispensation ends. He notes that the nation's salvation relies on a spiritual awakening rather than a political figure. Furthermore, Brandon anticipates a sudden, billion-soul global harvest and an Azusa Street-style outpouring of the Holy Spirit, which he states will precede the rapture event where believers are caught up for a seven-year tribulation before returning for the Millennial Reign.
rawData: [August 26, 2024]-[Pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/sroLpUHHhXM]-[Hey, good morning family! I'm excited to be with you all again today. I am going to do another 'Pray with Me' video to motivate yourself to pray. I'll be praying in English and I'll be praying in tongues. I believe corporate prayer is important in these last days, even more than ever before. Now is the time we need to pray as a body. I believe as we join together in this video, there will be many of you praying for unsaved loved ones and the nation. Whatever is on your heart, let's just pray together. I'll be leading the prayer by myself; I'm not going to do it with Lynn Hammond in a split screen. I'm just going to do it how I pray every day by myself and seek the Lord. I'm letting you into my prayer time and we are just going to pray and seek the Father to see what He has for us. I hope this helps you jump into the river in your own personal prayer life. I'm not saying I'm the greatest prayer warrior, but the Lord told me to do it, so I'm jumping into this river and let's see where it takes us. I always start out by singing a song to the Father. I enter His courts with thanksgiving and praise, and that's what we're going to do right now. Father, we just want to say thank you for all that You've done and all that You're going to do. Lord, we worship You and thank You for this day. We thank You, Father, for a new day that You've given us. This is the day that the Lord has made, and we will rejoice and be glad in it. Father, I just want to say thank You for the air that I breathe, for the food that we eat today, and for all that You've provided. As we start a new month, I thank You that we're getting ready for September and that You've provided for all the bills for the month of September for every household represented here. Whether it is electric, water, gas, phones, or car payments, whatever they have need of, Father, You've provided. I thank You, Father, that You are the great provider, the great Jehovah. I want to give You praise and glory. I'm just going to sing You a song, Father, and I thank You that You said You inhabit the praises of Your people. We give You praise and we want to worship You today, Father. We honor You and thank You, Lord, that You're so real to us and that there is a heavy presence of Your Spirit on us today. We invite You into this day, into our homes, our jobs, and our workplaces. Holy Spirit, I thank You that You're going with our children to school today and that You protect them. No weapon formed against them shall prosper. I plead the blood over our children; no weapon and no devil in hell can come nigh them. Not one hair on their heads will be touched by any kind of demonic attack. I thank You, Lord, that You are protecting them and that You send Your angels to bear us up in their hands lest we dash our foot against a stone. I thank You for Psalm 23 and Psalm 91. I give You praise and glory. Father, we say: fill my cup, Lord, I lift it up. Lord, come and quench this thirsting of my soul. Bread of Heaven, feed me till I want no more. Fill my cup, fill it up and make me whole. It is Jesus. We worship You, Holy Spirit. You are welcome in this place. Omnipotent Father of mercy and grace, Thou art welcome in this place. Jesus is coming soon, morning or night or noon. Many will meet their doom; trumpets will surely sound. All of the dead shall rise, righteous meet in the sky, going where no one dies, Heavenward bound. Lord, You're coming so soon. Lord, we're so thirsty and we need a fresh touch today. Come and quench this thirsting of my soul. Bread of Heaven, feed me till I want no more. Fill my cup, fill it up and make me whole. Amazing Grace, how sweet the sound that saved a wretch like me. I once was lost, but now I'm found, was blind but now I see. Through many dangers, toils, and snares, I have already come. 'Tis grace that brought me safe this far, and grace will lead me home. When we've been there ten thousand years, bright shining as the sun, we've no less days to sing God's praise than when we first begun. Thank You, Father, that even when we mess up the words, You still inhabit the praises of Your people because it's from our hearts. Father, we thank You that if we abide in You and Your words abide in us, we shall ask what we will. We lift up all the needs of the people today. If we make much of the blood, the blood makes much of us. What can wash away my sin? Nothing but the blood of Jesus. Oh, precious is the flow that makes me white as snow; no other fount I know, nothing but the blood of Jesus. The blood that gives me strength from day to day will never lose its power, for it reaches to the highest mountain and flows to the lowest valley. Glory to the Lamb! You are glorious and worthy to be praised. You're the Lamb upon the throne, and unto You, we lift our voice in praise. Father, we thank You for Your hand on this house. We worship You and give You glory right now in Jesus' name. Holy Spirit, we invite You now. What is on Your heart for us to pray for today? We yield ourselves over to the Holy Spirit and thank You that You become so real to us. There are so many needs and things pressing that seem overwhelming, but we thank You, Lord, that You are the peace in the midst of the storm. You say, 'Peace, be still,' to all storms. We call peace to every storm in the lives of every individual here today, in marriages and for children. We take authority over you, Satan, and we tell you: thus far and no further! Get your hands off of God's property. We call those in the storm of life healed, whole, and well in Jesus' name. You are the great storm peacemaker; You spoke to the waves and said, 'Peace, be still.' We thank You, Lord, that You're the mighty one, the Creator of everything. You created us even in our mothers' wombs. Every cell and every hair on our head was fearfully and wonderfully made. I thank You that we go up higher and higher with You in greater glory and greater manifestations of Your presence. We want to be at the spout where the glory comes out, going from glory to glory. I thank You, Lord, for the manifestations of that glory in our homes. We want to be a vessel that You use in these last days. The eyes of the Lord run to and fro throughout the whole earth, looking for a heart whose heart is perfect toward Him. Let Your eyes rest upon me today, oh God. Create in me a clean heart, oh God. You are the Potter and I am the clay; mold me and make me today. We have this treasure in earthen vessels, that the excellency of the power would be of You and not of me. Holy Spirit, make me more like Jesus. We are yielded, filled, and controlled by the Holy Spirit today. We are at that river of living water flowing out of the throne. We're coming up higher with the fire. There are levels of the prophetic and levels of Your presence. Father, we yield ourselves to You today so that we would be a light in the darkness and the salt of the earth—the salt that makes people thirsty for You. Help us to be the light to somebody today, an answer to prayer in their heart. Let Your glory shine on our faces like it did upon Moses. Let our shadow pass by like it did the disciples, so that healing flows. Even if they touched the shadow, the glory was pouring out so strong that it would heal them. Do it again, Lord! Do it in us; do it in me. Create in us a clean heart, God. In these last days, pour out Your Spirit upon us one more time like You did at Azusa Street. I thank You, Lord, for the greatest harvest of souls this world has ever seen—a billion-soul harvest that would happen quickly and suddenly in the name of Jesus. I call each person watching this video today healed and whole. Nothing is too big for You, Lord. I call them blessed, healed, and whole mentally, emotionally, physically, and financially. I thank You, Father, for healing power that flows on the inside of them, driving out all sickness and disease. It's already done, and we receive it. Faith calls those things that be not as though they were. You paid the price for us to walk in healing. Lord, we pray over our finances. You said to seek first the kingdom and all these things will be added. We seek You today, knowing You know we have every need. We seek You, not for the things, but for You. We take the care out of our prayer and cast our cares onto You because You care for us. If You care for the lily of the field and the sparrow, how much more do You care for us? David said he had never seen the righteous forsaken nor his seed begging bread. I thank You that we are the righteousness of God in Christ Jesus. As we seek You daily, we will find You. We knock, and the door is opened to us. You have prepared a table before us in the presence of our enemies, and we rest in the finished work of Jesus Christ. Great is Your faithfulness to us. Morning by morning, new mercies I see; all I have needed Thy hand hath provided. Thank You for our unsaved loved ones. We send laborers across their path today. Some plant, some water, and some bring forth the increase, but we keep the door open by the blood. We call them home in Jesus' name. One last call—wake up! We call them to a fresh touch from Jesus. Now, I'm going to pray in tongues and pray perfect prayers out of my spirit. I thank You, Holy Spirit, that You move in me and pray perfect prayers that go straight to the throne. I'm interceding now over that virus they were talking about, calling forth divine protection over the righteous. I'm seeing a wristwatch, a clock that is going backwards, rewinding and giving more time. Time is running out. The hand of time is coming to an end for this dispensation. We are getting ready to step into the Millennial Reign. When You showed me the wristwatch and Trump, I wondered if we need to lift him up—that his time is not over. Father, bring in one final push, waking up the bride and the church. We don't look to a man to save this nation; we look to Jesus. It will only be an awakening unto God that will save America. I pray a special covering over every individual here, that the plague does not come nigh us. No virus in hell can come nigh us. We cover ourselves and our families in the blood. We are in the peace that passes all understanding concerning our hearts and families. We thank You, Lord, that we're always in the right place at the right time. Thank you for joining me today. I know a lot of you have to get back to work, but I wanted to give a little video of prayer so you could jump in the river and get some encouragement on the way to work. If you liked it, give it a thumbs up. I'll do more like this if you want to sing or pray more with me. It's on my heart. I want to pray more about the thing I just saw: Trump's face and that clock. It was a wristwatch moving backwards and then forwards to the 15-minute mark. It was a short span of time—a delay, but then it moved back. It's like He's saying time's up; He gave more time, and now the time is up. Jesus is coming, folks, and I hope you all are ready. We are going to see a great harvest of souls. There is going to be a move of His presence beyond anybody's comprehension. It will be a quick work. Then we'll be caught up for the seven-year tribulation to be with Him, and then we'll come back down. I want you all to be encouraged today. Yes, there are dark days, but the light is getting lighter. You have authority and are seated with Him in the heavenlies. You have nothing to fear as a believer bought with the blood of Jesus. To be absent from the body is to be present with the Lord. When we die, we go home to see Jesus; we're instantaneously with Him in glory. Jesus has a plan for your life to prosper you and be in health, even as your soul prospers. There are good days ahead for the believers. If you're new here and never seen me before, God bless you for sticking around. I'm going to do more videos like this because the Lord told me to. Put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you so much. God bless you and have a wonderful day. See you next time.]
